recipe.title: Easy sausage carbonara
recipe.description: This tagliatelle carbonara is a super easy carbonara recipe. Using sausages instead of pancetta or bacon gives this dish an extra level of flavour

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps.descr: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water...
steps.instructions: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

on_enter.say: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, squeeze the sausagemeat out of the skins,...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, squeeze the sausagemeat out of the skins, then, with wet hands, quickly shape into 18 even-sized balls.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, squeeze the sausagemeat out of the skins, then, with wet hands, quickly shape into 18 even-sized balls.

steps.descr: Roll and coat them in black pepper, then cook in a non-...
steps.instructions: Roll and coat them in black pepper, then cook in a non- stick frying pan on a medium heat with ½ a tablespoon of olive oil until golden and cooked through, tossing regularly, then turn the heat off.

on_enter.say: Roll and coat them in black pepper, then cook in a non- stick frying pan on a medium heat with ½ a tablespoon of olive oil until golden and cooked through, tossing regularly, then turn the heat off.

steps.descr: Finely chop the parsley, stalks and all, beat it with...
steps.instructions: Finely chop the parsley, stalks and all, beat it with the egg and a splash of pasta cooking water, then finely grate and mix in most of the Parmesan.

on_enter.say: Finely chop the parsley, stalks and all, beat it with the egg and a splash of pasta cooking water, then finely grate and mix in most of the Parmesan.

steps.descr: Toss the drained pasta into the sausage pan, pour in the...
steps.instructions: Toss the drained pasta into the sausage pan, pour in the egg mixture, and toss for 1 minute off the heat (the egg will gently cook in the residual heat).

on_enter.say: Toss the drained pasta into the sausage pan, pour in the egg mixture, and toss for 1 minute off the heat (the egg will gently cook in the residual heat).

steps.descr: Loosen with a good splash of reserved cooking water,...
steps.instructions: Loosen with a good splash of reserved cooking water, season to perfection with sea salt and pepper, and finely grate over the remaining Parmesan.

on_enter.say: Loosen with a good splash of reserved cooking water, season to perfection with sea salt and pepper, and finely grate over the remaining Parmesan.
